mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, patient_id, disease_code, plan_type, enrollment_type, template_id, status, start_date, end_date, created_by, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM care_plan WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO care_plan ( tenant_id, patient_id, disease_code, plan_type, enrollment_type, template_id, status, start_date, end_date, created_by ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{patientId}, #{diseaseCode}, #{planType}, #{enrollmentType}, #{templateId}, #{status}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE care_plan SET patient_id = #{patientId}, disease_code = #{diseaseCode}, plan_type = #{planType}, enrollment_type = #{enrollmentType}, template_id = #{templateId}, status = #{status}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, created_by = #{createdBy} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
